title: Justin Rostant
compiled_truth: Justin Rostant is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-16 to 2002-03-04), Justin Rostant sent 128 and received 378 emails, totalling 506 interactions. Top correspondents: [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (102), [David Forster](people/david-forster) (93), [Savita Puthigai](people/savita-puthigai) (81), [Bob Shults](people/bob-shults) (80), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (59).
